name: ReadU passage quality rubric

criteria.label: Reading level
criteria.description: The estimated U.S. grade level of the passage is within ±1 grade of the target grade.

criteria.label: Length
criteria.description: Passage word count falls within the requested range for the grade band (G4: 190-260, G6: 300-410, G8: 440-560 words).

criteria.label: Question count & format
criteria.description: Exactly 5 multiple-choice questions, each with exactly 4 answer options.

criteria.label: Single correct answer
criteria.description: Each question has exactly one defensibly-correct answer, and correctIndex points to it.

criteria.label: Plausible distractors
criteria.description: The wrong options are plausible but clearly incorrect to a careful reader of the passage (not absurd, not arguable).

criteria.label: Skill match
criteria.description: Each question's declared skill label matches the skill the question actually tests, and any requested focus skills are represented.

criteria.label: Vocabulary grounded
criteria.description: Every vocabulary word actually appears in the passage, and each definition is accurate and kid-friendly.

criteria.label: Age appropriate
criteria.description: No violence, romance, or frightening content; tone and topics are suitable for ages 10-14.

criteria.label: Factual accuracy
criteria.description: If the passage is informational, every stated fact is accurate. Automatically passes for clearly fictional narratives.

passRule: A passage PASSES only if every critical criterion passes AND at most one non-critical criterion fails.
